## Meeting Purpose

[Transition Discern account management from Carrie to Jenn and Megan, discuss current progress, and plan future content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Carrie is transitioning off the Discern account; Jenn and Megan will take over management](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Site health improved to above 90%; new reporting dashboard available but experiencing some errors](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Current content focus nearing completion; discussions needed on next topic areas (e.g., LLC formations)](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [New Atlas workflow for content generation introduced, with potential future client access](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

## Topics

### Team Transition and Introductions

  - [Carrie transitioning off; Jenn Peters (Managing Editor) and Megan Dickey (Associate Director) taking over](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Megan's background: 15 years in journalism, including TechCrunch and Backstage Capital](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Jenn's experience: \~10 years in content management, SEO, and AEO](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Ade, the current writer, will continue working on the account](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### Site Health and Content Updates

  - [Site health improved to above 90%](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Fixed duplicate H1 meta title issue; separate fields now on blog template](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Recommendation to remove redirecting pages from sitemap](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [On track to deliver 25 new articles; automation possible due to improved accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [9 articles still pending, including question about Iowa franchise tax content](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [New extensive reporting dashboard introduced (some errors present)](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Allows drilling down into individual pages, clicks, and impressions by week](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Correlation observed between publishing frequency and impressions/clicks](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Steady increase in impressions, following expected weekday/weekend patterns](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [Nearing completion of initial four topic areas](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Potential focus on LLC formations across different states](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Opportunity to create content for specific verticals (e.g., funds management, private equity)](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Possibility of more in-depth content on existing topics (e.g., benefits of registered agents)](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)

### Atlas Workflow Introduction

  - [New internal content generation platform](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Designed for programmatic SEO with quick assignment creation](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Includes research, outline, and first draft generation](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Potential future client access to the platform](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mike to review Iowa franchise tax content question](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Discuss and decide on next topic areas for content focus (e.g., LLC formations, specific verticals)](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Explore potential use of Atlas for Discern's specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Tag both Megan and Jenn for future communications and questions](https://fathom.video/share/4ZG_m8U5NC4-u85XaoUbkyoA49wo5gqc?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
